calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-27-2024 Off Calendar

Request/Motion For Prove-Up Hearing; Summary Of The Case In Support Of Request For Default Judgment; And Declaration Of Henry Yu In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Mar-06-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for prove up hearing for Default Judgement against Defendant Aida Caffrey.

Dept:505; Judge: Maria Evangelista; Clerk: K. Valdes; Proceedings reported by "For The Record" commencing at 11:03:42 a.m. and concluding at 11:14:12 a.m.(D505)

Henry Yu, Esq. representing Plaintiff Wohua Zhu.
Plaintiff Wohua Zhu was placed under oath and was assisted by Cantonese speaking interpreter Amanda Peters; Provisionally Certified.
Defendant Aida Caffrey not appearing.

Plaintiff's complaint for personal injury filed on August 26, 2020.
Proof of substituted service served on August 17 , 2022 as to Defendant Aida Caffrey; mailed on August 18, 2022; service effectuated on August 29, 2022.
Dismissal as to Defendant Majed Joe Shair filed on November 8, 2022.
Default entered as to Defendant Aida Caffrey on January 19, 2023.
Dismissal as to Defendant Does 1 to 20 filed on October 24, 2023.

Counsel to provide a summary of the case and its causes of action.
Counsel to provide offer of proof as to general damages sought.
The Court addresses the Plaintiff and confirms that attorney's declaration is true and correct.

The Court reviews the proposed order and modifies according to proof.

The Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against Defendant as follows:
Special Damages $6,063.00
General Damages: Pain and Suffering $25,000.00
General Damages: Emotional Distress $25,000.00
Costs $775.00
Attorney's Fees $0

Total Judgment Granted $56,838.00

Modified proposed judgment signed and executed by the Court this day.
